# Project Guidelines

## Commit Conventions

Follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) specification:

```
<type>(<optional scope>): <description>
```

- **Types**: `feat`, `fix`, `refactor`, `style`, `docs`, `chore`, `build`, `ci`, `perf`, `test`
- **Scope**: optional, lowercase (e.g., `cmf`, `ppu`, `market`)
- **Description**: imperative mood, lowercase, no period at the end
- Keep the subject line under 72 characters
- Do not include a body or footer unless the change requires additional explanation
